title: Scheduler
description: A full-featured scheduler/calendar component supporting multiple views, drag & drop, data loading, holidays, and localization.

sections.title: Views
sections.description: Switch between different scheduler view types (day, week, month, timeline, agenda)

sections.title: Calendar Types
sections.description: Switch between different calendar systems (Gregorian, Solar Hijri)

sections.title: Working Hours
sections.description: Configure business hours vs full day scheduling

sections.title: Drag & Drop
sections.description: Configure appointment dragging behavior with configurable delays

sections.title: Readonly Mode
sections.description: Switch between read-only and editable modes

sections.title: Custom Templates
sections.description: Switch between default and custom tooltip templates

sections.title: Data Loading
sections.description: Simulate async data loading and error scenarios

sections.title: Holidays
sections.description: Show/hide weekend indicators and holiday data

sections.title: Custom Header
sections.description: Manage scheduler navigation and views with custom header

sections.title: Actions
sections.description: Click on appointment action buttons to see context menu

sections.title: Current Time Indicator
sections.description: Toggle the current time indicator line that shows the current time position

sections.title: Resources
sections.description: Manage multiple resources with timeline views, resource headers, and unassigned appointments

props.name: calendar
props.description: Calendar type to use for date calculations and display.

props.name: startingDate
props.description: Initial date for the scheduler view.

props.name: dataSource
props.description: Data source for appointments (array, function, or async function).

props.name: holidays
props.description: Function to load holiday data for a given date range.

props.name: views
props.description: Available view types for the scheduler.

props.name: selectedView
props.description: Current view type of the scheduler.

props.name: currentDate
props.description: Current date for the scheduler view.

props.name: viewAppointments
props.description: Array of appointments filtered for the current view.

props.name: range
props.description: Current date range for the scheduler view.

props.name: currentDateText
props.description: Formatted text representation of the current date range.

props.name: calendarDepth
props.description: Calendar depth for date picker based on current view.

props.name: readonly
props.description: Whether the scheduler is in read-only mode.

props.name: draggable
props.description: Whether appointments can be dragged and dropped.

props.name: hasActions
props.description: Whether to show action buttons on appointments.

props.name: hasHeader
props.description: Whether to show the scheduler header.

props.name: allowFullScreen
props.description: Whether to allow fullscreen mode.

props.name: dragStartDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before drag starts.

props.name: weekend
props.description: Custom weekend days configuration. Array of day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday). If empty, uses calendar system defaults.

props.name: startDayHour
props.description: Start hour for day/week views (0-23).

props.name: endDayHour
props.description: End hour for day/week views (0-23).

props.name: multiDayViewDaysCount
props.description: Number of days to display in the timeline weekly view.

props.name: firstDayOfWeek
props.description: First day of the week for week views.

props.name: tooltipTemplate
props.description: Template for appointment tooltips.

props.name: showResourceHeaders
props.description: Whether to show resource headers in timeline views.

props.name: showCurrentTimeIndicator
props.description: Whether to show the current time indicator line.

props.name: showUnassignedAppointments
props.description: Whether to show appointments without assigned resources.

props.name: resources
props.description: Array of resources for timeline views.

props.name: resourceTemplate
props.description: Template for rendering resource headers.

props.name: appointments
props.description: Readonly signal containing all appointments.

props.name: calendarType
props.description: The type of calendar being used.

props.name: rtl
props.description: Whether the component is in right-to-left mode.

props.name: isFullScreen
props.description: Whether the component is in full screen mode.

props.name: viewsDataSource
props.description: Signal containing the available views.

props.name: prevDate
props.description: Signal containing the previous date.

props.name: prevView
props.description: Signal containing the previous view.

props.name: mappedAppointments
props.description: Signal containing mapped appointments with validated dates.

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: Inherited from NXComponent.

events.name: onAppointmentClicked
events.description: Fired when an appointment is clicked.

events.name: onAppointmentDblClicked
events.description: Fired when an appointment is double-clicked.

events.name: onAppointmentRightClick
events.description: Fired when an appointment is right-clicked.

events.name: onSlotClicked
events.description: Fired when a time slot is clicked.

events.name: onSlotDblClicked
events.description: Fired when a time slot is double-clicked.

events.name: onSlotRightClick
events.description: Fired when a time slot is right-clicked.

events.name: onAppointmentDrop
events.description: Fired when an appointment is dropped on a time slot.

events.name: onActionClick
events.description: Fired when an action button on an appointment is clicked.

events.name: onDataLoaded
events.description: Fired when appointment data is loaded.

events.name: onRangeChanged
events.description: Fired when the date range changes.

methods.content:
/**
* Handles view change events.
*
* @param e - The value changed event containing old and new view values.
*/
viewChanged(e: AXValueChangedEvent<AXSchedulerView>): void

/**
* Navigates to the next time period based on current view.
*/
nextClick(): void

/**
* Navigates to the previous time period based on current view.
*/
prevClick(): void

/**
* Handles calendar date change events.
*
* @param e - The value changed event containing the new date.
*/
calendarDateChanged(e: AXValueChangedEvent<Date>): void

/**
* Toggles fullscreen mode for the scheduler.
*/
handleFullScreen(): void

/**
* Refreshes the scheduler data.
*
* @param appointments - Optional array of appointments to refresh with.
*/
refresh(appointments?: AXSchedulerAppointment[]): Promise<void>

props.name: HOURS_PER_DAY
props.description: Constant for hours per day (24).

props.name: MINUTES_PER_HOUR
props.description: Constant for minutes per hour (60).

props.name: BLOCK_DURATION_MINUTES
props.description: Duration of each time block in minutes (30).

props.name: MILLISECONDS_PER_MINUTE
props.description: Milliseconds per minute constant.

props.name: MILLISECONDS_PER_DAY
props.description: Milliseconds per day constant.

props.name: internalHoliday
props.description: Signal containing internal holiday dates.

props.name: internalWeekend
props.description: Signal containing custom weekend day configuration. Array of day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday).

methods.content:
/**
* Checks if two appointments overlap in time.
* 
* @param appointmentA - First appointment to check.
* @param appointmentB - Second appointment to check.
* @returns boolean - True if appointments overlap, false otherwise.
*/
doAppointmentsOverlap(appointmentA: AXSchedulerAppointment, appointmentB: AXSchedulerAppointment): boolean

/**
* Calculates appointment duration in minutes.
* 
* @param Appointment - The appointment to calculate duration for.
* @returns number - Duration in minutes.
*/
calculateDurationInMinutes(Appointment: AXSchedulerAppointment): number

/**
* Gets the day index and block index for a given date time within the view context.
* 
* @param dateTime - The date time to get block identifier for.
* @param viewStartDate - Start date of the view.
* @param startHour - Start hour of the view.
* @param endHour - End hour of the view (exclusive).
* @param viewTotalDays - Total days in the view (default: 1).
* @returns AXSchedulerBlockIdentifier | null - Block identifier or null if outside view.
*/
getBlockIdentifier(dateTime: AXDateTime, viewStartDate: AXDateTime, startHour: number, endHour: number, viewTotalDays?: number): AXSchedulerBlockIdentifier | null

/**
* Calculates day view concurrency information for appointments.
* 
* @param singleDayAppointments - Array of appointment segments.
* @param viewStartDate - Start date of the view.
* @param startHour - Start hour of the view.
* @param endHour - End hour of the view.
* @returns Map<any, { maxConcurrency: number; effectiveTotalColumns: number }> - Concurrency information map.
*/
calculateDayViewConcurrencyInfo(singleDayAppointments: AXSchedulerAppointmentSegment[], viewStartDate: AXDateTime, startHour: number, endHour: number): Map<any, { maxConcurrency: number; effectiveTotalColumns: number }>

/**
* Groups appointments by day within a date range.
* 
* @param appointments - Array of appointments.
* @param viewStartDate - Start date of the view.
* @param viewEndDate - End date of the view.
* @returns Map<string, AXSchedulerAppointment[]> - Appointments grouped by day.
*/
groupAppointmentsByDay(appointments: AXSchedulerAppointment[], viewStartDate: AXDateTime, viewEndDate: AXDateTime): Map<string, AXSchedulerAppointment[]>

/**
* Gets the day of week number for a given day name.
* 
* @param dayName - The day name to get number for.
* @returns number - Day number (1-7, where 1 is Sunday).
*/
getDayOfWeekNumber(dayName: AXDayOfWeekName): number

/**
* Gets slot data for a given start date and view.
* 
* @param startDate - Start date for the slot.
* @param view - View type.
* @returns { startDate: AXDateTime; endDate: AXDateTime; view: AXSchedulerView } - Slot data.
*/
getSlotData(startDate: AXDateTime, view: AXSchedulerView): { startDate: AXDateTime; endDate: AXDateTime; view: AXSchedulerView }

/**
* Handles events for appointments and slots.
* 
* @param event - The event to handle.
* @param eventOutputMap - Map of event outputs.
* @param eventType - Type of event ('appointment' or 'slot').
*/
handleEvent(event: AXSchedulerSlotMouseEvent | AXSchedulerAppointmentMouseEvent, eventOutputMap: any, eventType: 'appointment' | 'slot'): void

/**
* Calculates timeline layout for appointments.
* 
* @param appt - The appointment to calculate layout for.
* @param viewStartHour - Start hour of the view.
* @param viewEndHour - End hour of the view.
* @returns { left: string; width: string } | null - Layout information or null.
*/
calculateTimelineLayout(appt: AXSchedulerAppointment, viewStartHour: number, viewEndHour: number): { left: string; width: string } | null

/**
* Gets cloned appointment segment for a specific day.
* 
* @param appointment - The appointment to clone.
* @param day - The day to get segment for.
* @param viewStartHour - Start hour of the view.
* @param viewEndHour - End hour of the view.
* @param isFullDayCellContext - Whether this is for full day cell context.
* @returns AXSchedulerAppointmentSegment | null - Cloned segment or null.
*/
getClonedAppointmentSegmentOnDay(appointment: AXSchedulerAppointment, day: AXDateTime, viewStartHour: number, viewEndHour: number, isFullDayCellContext?: boolean): AXSchedulerAppointmentSegment | null

/**
* Gets the original appointment from a segment.
* 
* @param item - Appointment or appointment segment.
* @returns AXSchedulerAppointment - The original appointment.
*/
getOriginalAppointment(item: AXSchedulerAppointment | AXSchedulerAppointmentSegment): AXSchedulerAppointment

/**
* Checks if a date is a holiday.
* 
* @param date - The date to check.
* @returns boolean - True if the date is a holiday.
*/
isHoliday(date: AXDateTime): boolean

/**
* Checks if a date is a weekend.
* 
* @param date - The date to check.
* @param calendar - The calendar type to use.
* @returns boolean - True if the date is a weekend.
*/
isWeekend(date: AXDateTime, calendar: string): boolean

/**
* Filters appointments by resources.
* 
* @param appointments - Array of appointments to filter.
* @param resources - Array of resources to filter by.
* @param showUnassignedAppointments - Whether to include unassigned appointments.
* @returns Map<any, AXSchedulerAppointment[]> - Appointments grouped by resource.
*/
filterAppointmentsByResources(appointments: AXSchedulerAppointment[], resources: AXSchedulerResource[], showUnassignedAppointments: boolean): Map<any, AXSchedulerAppointment[]>

/**
* Gets appointments for a specific resource.
* 
* @param appointments - Array of appointments to filter.
* @param resourceId - The resource ID to filter by.
* @returns AXSchedulerAppointment[] - Filtered appointments for the resource.
*/
getAppointmentsForResource(appointments: AXSchedulerAppointment[], resourceId: any): AXSchedulerAppointment[]

/**
* Gets all resource IDs from the resources array.
* 
* @param resources - Array of resources.
* @param showUnassignedAppointments - Whether to include 'unassigned' in the result.
* @returns any[] - Array of resource IDs.
*/
getAllResourceIds(resources: AXSchedulerResource[], showUnassignedAppointments?: boolean): any[]
